agent_features.label: Team strength rating
agent_features.detail: A FIFA-ranking-informed power score for every side - the baseline quality gap.

agent_features.label: Recent form (last 5)
agent_features.detail: Win/draw/loss momentum heading into the knockouts, not just the name on the shirt.

agent_features.label: Goals scored & conceded
agent_features.detail: Attacking output and defensive solidity across the tournament so far.

agent_features.label: Head-to-head history
agent_features.detail: How these two have actually fared against each other in the past.

agent_features.label: Goal involvement / top scorers
agent_features.detail: Who is carrying the goal threat - a hot striker swings tight ties.

agent_features.label: Shots on target & possession
agent_features.detail: Underlying performance signals from ESPN match stats, not just the scoreline.

agent_features.label: Squad availability
agent_features.detail: Suspensions and injuries to key players that quietly decide knockouts.

agent_features.label: Rest & travel
agent_features.detail: Days between games and distance travelled across a continent-sized host.

agent_features.label: Venue & home advantage
agent_features.detail: Host-nation edge and a modest lift for the higher-seeded side.

agent_features.label: Knockout conversion
agent_features.detail: No draws here - level games are resolved by who is likelier to survive ET/pens.
